programmes.show_description: It's Christmas in the outback. Wayne, Mira and Matty swap red dirt for white sand while attending a jet ski accident.
AC-12 struggle to deal with the fallout of the dramatic events of the previous episode, while Hastings makes a final bid to uncover institutionalised corruption.
Programmes start at 19:00.
Leanne keeps her distance. Drew battles his emotions. Life will never be the same for one resident.
Now with the full knowledge of Remi's tumour, Sonny demands to know why he was hiding it, but Remi won't give him an inch
In this edition we delve into fox behaviour, watching the Magnificent 7 cubs who we've been following since just days old, as they battle to establish their hierarchy.
Part two is the story of a single, magical, year as the seasons play out through and across Kerry's varied habitats.
A climatologist races across America to rescue his son as freak weather conditions cause devastation around the world. Disaster thriller, starring Jake Gyllenhaal and Dennis Quaid.
Addison Montgomery returns to Grey Sloan, seeking assistance with a patient with a neurological condition
The Arrival: Amanda Holden and Alan Carr take on their biggest and most ambitious project yet as they embark on transforming a run-down Andalusian townhouse into a boutique B&B.
The Dining Room: Amanda Holden and Alan Carr consider the dining room and foyer, seeking design inspiration at a boutique hotel filled with local salvaged treasures.
Joy: When an arrest reveals the truth of what happened to Joy, it shatters the Delaney family while leaving lingering questions about Joy's fate.

Campáil i bpluais: Téann an chlann Puifíní ar thuras spraíúil chun na pluaise faoi uisce.
An Bhlaosc Fholamh: Tá pobal na bportán dearg i gcontúirt nuair a thagann an t-am daofa a mblaosc a bhaint díobh.
Tá Sonia, Hugo, Mel, Poi, Mamaí, Deaide agus Mamó ar bhóithrín na smaointe.
Níl lachín Sonia ag oibriú i gceart. Ach taispeánann Hugo di go bhfuil bealaí eile chun spraoi léi.
Taispeánann an Spideog bealach go paiste sméara dubha do na Bheigíní, ach tá balla cloiche ard rompu. Conas a rachaidh siad thar an mballa chun na sméara a bhaint amach?
Cuidíonn Sherrod Heron leis na Bheigíní nuair a aithníonn siad nach bhfuil ciseáin acu le cispheil a imirt, ach ansin teastaíonn cabhair uaithi lena hiallacha a ceangail.
Tá ar na Bheigíní trí sheangáin agus a teaghlach a thabhairt le chéile arís nuair a leanann siad Smúirlín abhaile trí thimpiste.
Finny wants to make a video of his favourite hobby fishing. Joe is delivering corn, a boat and a camera to the lake to help him do this.
Zoom and her crew find out how things work!. (SL)
Blitz day brings drama and pride. Jordan has some bad news but surprise guests boost belief as United FC play with passion, proving that real victory is found in unity and heart.
Out of the Woods: During half term Millie persuades both sides of the family to go on a joint camping holiday, but is worried that sparks will fly among the adults.

A reckless encounter with Ash, Roo's arrogant childhood idol, leads the gang into a deadly Blight prison, where unity is the key to survival and escape.
It Takes two cockatoos: Bertha calls the Troop when she finds Britney and Christina arguing over a small bell.
Rabbit on a Hot Tin Roof: The Troop get a call, Prince is stuck up on the top of a sculpture! Without thinking, Maggie climbs up to save Prince only to discover she's afraid of heights!
A surprise for Aunt Departed: While planning Aunt Departed's birthday, Dilbert, Leo and Nora lose their memories. Can Mortina and Tragedy fix everything before she returns?
One jar too many: Mortina's friends grow strangely sad and nothing helps. The Mystery Squad uncovers the cause and learns the power of sharing feelings.
Dangerous Deliveries: Each time the postman makes a delivery, Bitzer's canine instincts get the better of him and he shreds the mail, so Shaun takes on the role of the sheepdog's therapist.
Manky Materials and Shifty States Special: Guy Mowbray narrates Elemental Gladiators.
Phoenix arrive at the Gothia Cup. After an eventful opening ceremony, they win their first match, but will the tensions simmering below the surface ruin everything?.
Out of the Woods: During half term Millie persuades both sides of the family to go on a joint camping holiday, but is worried that sparks will fly among the adults.
Alicia and Darrell are trapped in the cellar after Alicia receives bad news about her future, while Irene feels pressured about her musical ambitions.
Mirror/rorriM: A cast member is crushed to death during a school play. Year later, when the same show is staged again, she returns as a ghost to seek revenge.
Blitz day brings drama and pride. Jordan has some bad news but surprise guests boost belief as United FC play with passion, proving that real victory is found in unity and heart.
Two brothers want to auction off the valuable family home, but face a battle of wits to rid the property of its resident mouse.
Adam and his friends drink home-brewed beer at his birthday sleepover, and Murray tells Barry and Erica he will buy a new CD player for them if they write the greatest song ever.
While Sheldon is busy obsessing over the status of Meemaw's budding relationship with his mentor, Dr Sturgis, George and Mary attempt to bond with their other kids.
The Proton Displacement: When Professor Proton contacts Leonard instead of Sheldon for help, Sheldon turns to another TV scientist, Bill Nye.
Cece has her work cut out for her. Marty rekindles an old connection. Leanne lashes out.
Mackenzie and Levi return to the surf club, they're already seven weeks into the pregnancy, and they're dying to start telling people...
The best teams from both heats face new rivals, as they tackle chaussons aux pommes and a brand-new viennoiserie creation, before producing a garden paradise-themed showpiece.
In 2019, master carpenter Olaf and his partner Fritha built a triangular house on a tricky plot in West Sussex. Now, presenter Kevin returns to see how life has been for the family
Mum and Dad's Anniversary: The Jessops are off to an escape room if they can escape their own house.
After more than a decade documenting every moment of her life, busy social media star Cloda (29) from Tipperary is keen to ditch the apps and meet someone 'in the wild'.
Erin manages to secure herself the editorship of the school magazine - and soon uncovers an explosive story. Orla become obsessed by step aerobics.
